<think>

The user will only see what's inside the  tags.

The user wants ONLY valid JSON with specific fields: name, age, email. They explicitly say no markdown, no explanation. So I should provide exactly that. Realistic values means a plausible name, age between maybe 18-70, and a typical email format.

I will generate a simple JSON object with those fields. No extra text.

Approach: Just create a JSON object with a common name, an age like 32, and a plausible email address. That's it.

Now, in  I will output the JSON only.

</think>

{
  "name": "Jennifer Parker",
  "age": 28,
  "email": "jennifer.parker@example.com"
}
